title: Knowlogy Book
description: An expandable wiki-like book with documentation about the game, inspired by the knowledge book, powered by lavender.
body:
# Alpha Stage

The project is in Alpha sage, it means that it's unstable, missing a lot of the planned content and will have major changes on how it works through the development.

For a more stable alternative, see [Lexicon](https://modrinth.com/mod/lexicon).

# Book o' Knowlogy

![Landing Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/630b43b428692d14112f7921748338f466a1c2ec.png)

[![Available for Fabric](https://vinnystalck.gitlab.io/minecraft-badges/badges/fabric/compact-supports.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/knowlogy/versions?l=fabric)
[![Available for NeoForge](https://vinnystalck.gitlab.io/minecraft-badges/badges/neoforge/compact-supports.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/knowlogy/versions?l=neoforge)

[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/V4OTaHaq?style=flat&logo=modrinth&label=Downloads&labelColor=03190a&color=1e1e1e)](https://modrinth.com/mod/knowlogy)
[![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/944409?style=flat&logo=curseforge&label=Downloads&labelColor=241009&color=1e1e1e)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/knowlogy)

This mod adds the **Book 'o Knowlogy**, that shows the information from the [Minecraft Wiki](https://minecraft.wiki/), that takes in consideration the game's progression by unlocking pages as the player completes achievements. 

It's meant to be a way of showing a lot information, without overwhelming the player with walls of text or giant list of items right from the start of the game, but still making the rich documentation from a wiki to be available when useful.

## Dependencies

[![owo Lib](https://vinnystalck.gitlab.io/minecraft-badges/badges/owo-lib/compact-requires.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)
[![Lavender](https://vinnystalck.gitlab.io/minecraft-badges/badges/lavender/compact-requires.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/lavender)

### Fabric only:

[![Fabric API](https://vinnystalck.gitlab.io/minecraft-badges/badges/fabric-api/compact-requires.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)


### NeoForge only:

[![Sinytra Connector](https://vinnystalck.gitlab.io/minecraft-badges/badges/sinytra-connector/compact-requires.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)
[![Forgified Fabric API](https://vinnystalck.gitlab.io/minecraft-badges/badges/forgified-fabric-api/compact-requires.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api)

## Name

Based on the [Knowledge Book](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Knowledge_Book) that teaches (or unlocks) recipes to the player and the [Host of Knowledge](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Minecraft_Legends:Knowledge) from [Minecraft: Legends](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Minecraft_Legends), the [Know](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Knowledge)+[-logy](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/-logy) book is the study of that knowledge, that shows more than just recipes.

## Lore

Created by [The Host of Knowledge](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Minecraft_Legends:Knowledge), this magical artifact is able to acquire knowledge from it's environment end share it with who reads it.

## Extensibility

The content is added through resource packs that comes with the mod, and are divided by game updates. So anyone can expand it with a resource pack that adds or modify pages and categories.

## Questions

### How do I Get the Book?

- You will receive one by placing a Crafting Table on the floor for the first time (triggers an achievement);
- It's craftable with a Book and a Bottle o' Enchanting in any shape;
- Can be found in the Tools and Utilities Creative mode tab;
- Or via the command `/get-lavender-book knowlogy:knowlogy_book` or `/give @s knowlogy:knowlogy_book` (the later is Fabric only).

### Another Recipe Viewer?

No, the focus is to show how the items are connected, with explanations on how the gameplay mechanics work.

It's actually recommended to be used with mods like [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) and [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) that will automatically show recipes that would have to be added manually in the book.

## Common Issues

### Book is Empty

Go to your resource pack list and make sure that the built-in Knowlogy resource packs are enabled (they have 'Knowlogy' in the name and has the icon of the book).

The data of the pages are inside those resource packs, therefore the book will show no entries (Unlocked: 0/0 and all categories locked) if they are not enabled. They are enabled by default, but Minecraft may have disabled them on a resource loading error.

### NeoForge | Missing Lavender Dependency

Knowlogy Book needs [Lavender](https://modrinth.com/mod/lavender) to work, but unfortunatly it's a Fabric exclusive mod. To go around that, Knowlogy Book for NeoForge has [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) with [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api) as required dependencies. Connector allows Lavender and other Fabric mods to run on NeoForge.

Launchers (Prism Launcher, ModrinthApp, CurseForge etc.) will not automatically download Lavender if the loader is NeoForge. To install Lavender use the filters provided by your launcher to include Fabric mods and you I'll be able to search for Lavender and install it.

### NeoForge | Book does Nothing

Please get the item from either the Achievement, Crafting recipe or with the command `/get-lavender-book knowlogy:knowlogy_book`.

The Knowlogy Book item with id `knowlogy:knowlogy_book` doesn't work on NeoForge. So don't use the one found on mods like EMI or JEI.
